title: [RELOAD] EEEAB's Mobs
description: [RELOAD] - This is a resource pack that offers a completely new look at the EEEAB's Mobs mod.
body:
# ✨What is this resource pack?
[RELOAD] EEEAB's Mobs is a resource pack that completely reworks the visual part of the famous [EEEAB's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/project/N8MNCv66) mod.


# 🔄What's changed:
_The textures remain stylistically faithful to standard Minecraft, but have a modern and polished look. Some animations have also been updated._
  

## Items.

<details>
<summary>Items Spoiler</summary>

### Ghost Ingot and Armour: 
![Ghost Ingot and Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4cc14c071fb1f6aa0c3bdfb2d535102361ae20b.png)

### Immortal Scrap/Ingot and Weapons:
![Immortal Scrap/Ingot and Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f94b77bae0be5b42acabe55226b25e369f27077.png)

### Upgrade, Music discs and Boss Weapons:
![Upgrade, Music discs and Boss Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04d0155140fefa565c11f22f5d9b6198730133f3.png)

</details>

> Status: 80%

# How to start?
1. Install Forge 1.20.1 and EEEAB'S Mobs mod.
2. Download resource pack .zip.
3. Move archive to the folder "resourcepacks".
4. Have a nice game!

# ⠀
_*I used a translator because my English is not very good, please keep that in mind._
